testcase.name: runScenario["Verify login with multiple credentials", "Login functionality on DemoQA"](1)

failure.message: Login should be successful expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Login should be successful expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at stepdefinitions.LoginSteps1.user_should_see_result(LoginSteps1.java:39) at ✽.user should see "Login Successful"(file:///C:/Users/aditi/Desktop/capg%20training/SeleniumGrid/extentreport-selenium/src/test/resources/features/multiple.feature:7)
